title: pterostylis longicornis
intro: Pterostylis longicornis, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues and soothing skin irritations. The greenhood orchid is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures, capsules, and topical creams.
